args.label: Map
args.help: Map key: courtyard, switchback, or hazard_ring

args.label: Max Steps
args.help: Episode hard stop when this step count is reached.

args.label: Auto Advance Episodes
args.help: When true, terminal states immediately start a new episode in the same arena.

args.label: Random Start
args.help: When true, each episode starts from a random open tile.

args.label: Goal Reward
args.help: Reward applied when reaching goal tile G.

args.label: Lava Penalty
args.help: Reward applied when stepping on lava tile L.
